hero.badge: ⚡ Tool for developers and IT architects
hero.description: ThreeDocsy is a tool for people who want to quickly and effectively present their solutions, visions and architecture. Interactive blocks instead of dry PDFs — one thing at a time, zero information overload.
hero.ctaFree: Create model for free — no registration

learning.title: Why interactivity beats documentation?
learning.description: PDFs and wikis go unread. ThreeDocsy makes the recipient discover the system themselves — step by step, at their own pace. Result? Fewer questions for you, faster onboarding, better understanding.
learning.card1Desc: Clicking, rotating the model and step-by-step navigation engage spatial and motor memory.
learning.card1Highlight: Interactive learning engages more than passive reading.
learning.card2Title: One step = one piece of information
learning.card2Desc: Each step contains exactly one idea. The recipient is not overwhelmed —
learning.card2Desc2: just a specific node and its role in the system.
learning.card3Desc: A 3D model is not just a visual effect — its very presence makes the recipient stay longer and
learning.card3Highlight: builds a lasting mental map of the system
learning.card3Desc2: instead of memorizing random wiki fragments.

features.sectionDesc: From an interactive system model to a ready-to-share link — in minutes.
features.f1Desc: Turn architecture, data flows and microservices into an interactive 3D model. Show your idea — instead of explaining it for an hour in a meeting.
features.f2Desc: A new developer understands the entire tech stack on day one — without wading through 200-page wikis and without bombarding seniors with questions.
features.f3Desc: Deploy, incident response, maintenance — document them as step sequences with node highlighting. No more knowledge locked in senior devs' heads.
features.f4Desc: Generate a link and send — no installation, no login on the other side. Your model works immediately in the browser, on any device.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps from a blank canvas to a ready interactive presentation.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Add nodes — servers, services, databases — connect them with arrows and give each a color. Your IT architecture in 3D ready in minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Add a short description to each node — one step, one piece of information. Arrange them in a sequence that the recipient will go through independently, at their own pace.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Click "Share", copy the link and send. The recipient opens the model in the browser — no registration, no installation of anything, on any device.

useCases.title: Who is ThreeDocsy for?
useCases.subtitle: For every developer and IT team that has something to show — and wants to be understood.
useCases.testimonial: "Instead of explaining the architecture for hours in meetings — I send a link. Everyone understands immediately."
useCases.testimonialAuthor: — Example use case: senior developer in a product team

stats.subtitle: We don't hide numbers — even when they're small. You're one of the first users, which means your suggestions genuinely shape the product. Every opinion goes directly to the creators.
stats.transparencyTitle: 💡 Why do we show these numbers?
stats.transparencyDesc: We believe transparency builds trust. A small number of users is not a weakness — it's an opportunity. Join now and co-create the tool from the ground up. Your needs will be among the first we hear.

cta.title: Ready to show your system?
cta.subtitle: Create your first interactive IT model in 5 minutes — for free, no registration.
